author: Sean Murphy
content:
A great value curry house for when you're out in town with your pals.
They have a different choice of currys each day, with veggie options available too. For £7, you get rice and a choice of three different curries.
I had tikka masala, chicken curry, and lamb and spinach. I also had a meat samosa which was extra. The food was great.
It's not plush, but when you're out for a few beers and fancy a quick bite to eat. It's worth the visit.
I spent £27, as I paid for my son's too. But we were all satisfied.
